title: Sequences & Series
blurb: Arithmetic and geometric: nth terms, sums, hidden ratios, and the infinite series that converges.

forms.title: Arithmetic: the nth term
forms.skill: a_n = a_1 + (n−1)d — n−1 steps from the start.

variants.statement: An arithmetic sequence has $a_1 = 2$ and difference $d = 4$. Find $a_{8}$.
variants.explanation: $a_n = a_1 + (n-1)d$: $a_{8} = 2 + 7 \cdot (4) = 30$. The step count is $n-1$, not $n$.
